title: Create release tag before draft release

sources.reason: The second release attempt proved a draft release has no fetchable tag ref before publication.
Regression coverage for explicit tag creation before draft release.

riskAssessment.reason: Draft release creation does not create a remote tag ref; release must create the exact SHA tag explicitly first.

executionDecision.reason: The failure evidence identifies a bounded workflow fix and regression test.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the tag is created from SOURCE_COMMIT before draft release creation and strict tag smoke dispatch.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release.yml explicitly pushes RELEASE_TAG to SOURCE_COMMIT before creating the draft release.
tests/test_workflows.py asserts explicit tag creation precedes draft release creation.
Strict smoke remains required before draft publication.
The release workflow test suite passes and v0.5.29 publishes from the new main SHA.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The release workflow cannot validate or smoke-test a tag that draft release creation has not created.
intent.rationale: Create the immutable tag explicitly before draft release creation so every later step can address the same ref.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Tag exists at exact source before draft release

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized fully automatic execution of CI and release remediation.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
